context.audience: Full-stack developers implementing login and access control, startup teams choosing auth providers for their SaaS, security-conscious developers building role-based and multi-tenant systems
pain_points: Choosing between auth providers like Clerk, Auth.js, Supabase Auth, and building custom auth
Implementing multi-tenancy with proper data isolation and role-based access control
OAuth and social login integration across multiple identity providers
Session management and token refresh patterns for SPAs and SSR applications
Securing AI endpoints and managing per-user API access and rate limiting
